root_cause: The active assessment state reused the old pre-redesign combined layout, so flowStarted rendered both the question form and legacy payment/access panels.
repair_summary: The active flow now renders a focused assessment-only layout while the premium entry page remains gated behind !flowStarted.

render_split_policy.entry_page: Business Assessment checkout, MORE Monthly Intelligence, and Access/Codes panels render only before flowStarted.
render_split_policy.assessment_active_view: Current question, answer field, navigation, submission, generation, success, and error states render when flowStarted is true.
render_split_policy.retrieved_results: Completed assessment retrieval result rendering remains unchanged.

assessment_active_view_policy: No pricing, checkout, promo, profile validation, or retrieval panels are shown around the active question flow.
entry_page_policy: The clean premium three-panel entry page remains the only initial entry/payment/access layout.
production_smoke_plan: initial Business Assessment entry shows premium three-panel layout
active assessment view hides entry/payment/access panels after approved start
no backend writes beyond existing validation flow
limits: No assessment question or generation changes
Manual live Profile ID plus promo retest may be required
